title: Nintendo DS
content:
Iwata Asks HomeNintendo DS
Pok脙漏mon Black Version 2 and Pok脙漏mon White Version 2
1. Two Sequels Two Years Later2. One-Hundred-Player Multiplayer Gaming3. Pok脙漏mon Space Fantasy4. A Pok脙漏mon Center in the First City5. What Pok脙漏mon Values6. Three Sacred Treasures
Two Sequels Two Years LaterIwata
I've gathered you all here before release of Pok脙漏mon Black Version 2 and Pok脙漏mon White Version 2 for the Nintendo DS system. Thank you for coming.
Everyone
Thank you for inviting us.
Iwata
I would like to jump right in by hearing how the idea for Pok脙漏mon Black Version 2 and Pok脙漏mon White Version 2 came about. Ishihara-san, if you would, please.
Ishihara
OK. I'm Ishihara from The Pok脙漏mon Company1. Pok脙漏mon Diamond Version and Pok脙漏mon Pearl Version2 were followed by Pok脙漏mon Platinum Version3, and Pok脙漏mon Ruby Version and Pok脙漏mon Sapphire Version4 were followed by Pok脙漏mon Emerald Version5, so we discussed what kind of product would come together after Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version6.
1. The Pok脙漏mon Company: In addition to brand management of everything related to Pok脙漏mon, the company operates seven Pok脙漏mon Centers around Japan. Founded in 2000. Headquarters: Tokyo.
2. Pok脙漏mon Diamond Version and Pok脙漏mon Pearl Version: Video games released for the Nintendo DS芒聞垄 system in September 2006.
3. Pok脙漏mon Platinum Version: A game released for the Nintendo DS system in September 2008 as the new version of Pok脙漏mon Diamond Version and Pok脙漏mon Pearl Version.
4. Pok脙漏mon Ruby Version and Pok脙漏mon Sapphire Version: Games released for the Nintendo Game Boy Advance system in November 2002.
5. Pok脙漏mon Emerald Version: A video game released for the Nintendo Game Boy Advance system in September 2004 as the new version of Pok脙漏mon Ruby Version and Pok脙漏mon Sapphire Version.
6. Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version: Games released for the Nintendo DS family of systems in September 2010.
Iwata
Like a difference in color芒聙聰for example, "How about coming out with Pok脙漏mon Gray Version?"
Ishihara
Yeah. But lots of players were expecting us to follow the same pattern, so for the first time we decided to try adding a "2" for a pleasant surprise.
IwataSomething else that's different from the pattern so far is that you're releasing two games. When I first heard that, I couldn't help but say, "Huh? Two?!"Ishihara
That sort of surprise is what gives this product its newness. I'd like to have Masuda-san and Unno-san talk about what we aimed for in sequels to Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version.
Iwata
All right, Masuda-san?Masuda
I'm Masuda from GAME FREAK7. As for why we're releasing two, we thought of a game mechanic to put in when we were developing Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version, but we didn't have enough time to do it. We needed two games for that, so this time we decided to make two.
7. GAME FREAK inc.: The video game developer responsible for the Pok脙漏mon series and other titles. Founded in 1989.
Iwata
So that's why you made two.Masuda
Yes. A little later, we thought of making them sequels. When you told me that if we were going to release something for the Nintendo DS system, we had to come up with something new, I was really worried. (laughs) Then I thought, "How about sequels?"
Iwata
For games to have sequels is nothing unusual, but we'd never taken that direction with Pok脙漏mon, so it was new.Masuda
Yeah. And as for why we made it for the Nintendo DS system instead of Nintendo 3DS system, we wanted to make the same gameworld. Both games are set two years later than the first two.
Iwata
It's also two years later in the real world since Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version came out.Masuda
Yes. Then I appointed Unno-san to be director and had him start the project.
Iwata
Unno-san, would you please introduce yourself?Unno
Sure. I'm Unno from GAME FREAK. I was director of Pok脙漏mon Black Version 2 and Pok脙漏mon White Version 2. It's nice to meet you.
Iwata
It's nice to meet you, too. How long have you been involved with Pok脙漏mon?Unno
It's been exactly ten years. I first worked on Pok脙漏mon Ruby Version and Pok脙漏mon Sapphire Version. Since then, I've been involved with almost all of the main titles, like Pok脙漏mon FireRed Version and Pok脙漏mon LeafGreen Version8.
8. Pok脙漏mon FireRed Version and Pok脙漏mon LeafGreen Version: Remakes of Pok脙漏mon Red Version and Pok脙漏mon Green Version with various new elements added. Released for the Nintendo Game Boy Advance system in January 2004.
Iwata
After ten years, a big role came your way. Has it changed a lot?Unno
Yes, quite a lot. I had experience as art director, but this time I was in a position to offer instruction regarding the game's fundamentals, so while it was worthwhile, it was a struggle at first.
Iwata
Masuda-san, why did you have Unno-san be the director?Masuda
I think highly of his ability as an art director, so I thought he would be able to further reinforce the visual sense of Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version. I thought if someone lent support in planning, we could leave the directorial part to Unno-san. He was all for it, so I asked him to do it.
Iwata
So you pulled him out of his comfort zone to have him grow another step. Unno-san, when he first assigned you, what did you think?Unno
I was surprised, of course, but I had told Masuda-san before that I wanted to be director. Every time we made a game, I thought, "Next, I want to develop this kind of gameplay!" Even when we made Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version, which were supposed to be a grand culmination, I thought strongly, "There are still so many ways to expand this!"
Iwata
At the time of Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version, I thought it was amazing how many elements you had packed into games for the Nintendo DS system, so this time, I couldn't imagine how you could ever develop it this much further. But this is how it turned out in response to the players two years later.Unno
Yes. We put a number of new play ideas that use communication features into Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version, but this time we also challenged ourselves to develop new gameplay that would have further evolved.Masuda
And having the setting be two years later was just right. Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version had a communication feature on the bottom screen called the C-Gear, and it was easy to imagine how that would evolve two years later.
Iwata
In other words, having those various elements芒聙聰a solid foundation, with a clear direction for expanding it, the idea of setting the games two years later, and the new style of making two sequels芒聙聰may have made it easier to make progress.
Unno
Yes. The keyword this time for Pok脙漏mon Black Version 2 and Pok脙漏mon White Version 2 was "resonance." In Pok脙漏mon Black Version and Pok脙漏mon White Version, you communicated with each other in a kind of "interference," but this time it's resonance, so we adopted gameplay that broadens each other's worlds.
Iwata Asks HomeNext
